creator: klaas.d@online.de
text:
Everytime imagemagick gets upgraded in ports rmagick fails to recompile against the new version.
this leads to an error if you use rmagick.
I am using portupgrade to update all installed ports.

Fix: 

recompile imagemagick
How-To-Repeat: - install imagemagick & rmagick
- upgrade imagemagick to a different version
